title: Resort Lace Fashion Editorial Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Resort Lace Fashion Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Sunlit resort fashion editorial portrait of adult woman with voluminous brunette hair and honey-blonde highlights in loose waves, built around refined lace summerwear, old-money Mediterranean architecture, and elegant vacation lifestyle detail. Subject: adult woman with voluminous brunette hair and honey-blonde highlights in loose waves wears white semi-sheer floral lace mini dress over opaque lining, bow-tied spaghetti straps, sweetheart neckline, flowy scalloped hem; the styling stays tasteful, adult, fully lined where needed, and shaped as a polished summer resort fashion look. Scene: sunlit stone terrace in a coastal village with manicured greenery, warm stone, stucco estate architecture, tiled roof details, blue sky, soft clouds, and woven straw market basket with lemons and wildflowers as a natural lifestyle accent. Composition: Eye-level portrait composition with graceful body language: standing near the stone railing, gaze off-camera to the right, one hand holding basket; the model remains the clear hero, framed by stone ledges or garden architecture with airy negative space and refined editorial balance. Signature Elements: Preserved resort lace fashion editorial portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-photorealistic summer resort fashion editorial with old-money elegance, realistic skin texture, glamorous hair detail, cinematic composition, high-resolution raw photo finish, and sophisticated coquette wardrobe language. Color Palette: Warm beige stone, white and ivory lace, sun-kissed skin tones, soft green lawn and hedges, blue sky, straw neutrals, and gentle golden highlights. Lighting: Bright natural daylight with sun-drenched clarity, soft but distinct overhead shadows, subtle skin sheen, and clean separation between model, dress texture, and Mediterranean background. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Delicate floral lace, scalloped fabric edges, woven straw texture, rough-hewn stone, stucco, manicured foliage, and realistic summer wardrobe craftsmanship. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
